title: UiPath Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
text: UiPath reported Q3 FY2026 financial results ended October 31, 2025. Revenue & Growth: Q3 revenue $411 million (+16% YoY), ARR $1.782 billion (+11% YoY), Net new ARR $59 million, Dollar-based net retention 107%. Profitability: GAAP operating income $13 million, Non-GAAP operating income $88 million, GAAP net income $198.8 million, EPS (diluted) $0.37. Cash Position: Operating cash flow (9 months) $188.9 million, Adjusted free cash flow (9 months) $189.5 million, Cash, equivalents, and marketable securities $1.52 billion. CEO Daniel Dines stated: "Enterprises are accelerating their AI and automation strategies, and they're looking for a unified platform rather than standalone tools." He highlighted the company's ability to combine "deterministic automation, agentic automation, and orchestration together in one trusted, governed system" as a competitive advantage. Q4 FY2026 Guidance: Revenue $462-$467 million, ARR (as of Jan 31, 2026) $1.844-$1.849 billion, Non-GAAP operating income ~$140 million.
